message:
fix(release): statically link OpenSSL to eliminate libssl.so.3 runtime dep (#109)

The fastembed rustls switch alone didn't eliminate OpenSSL because:
- ssh2 -> libssh2-sys -> openssl-sys (SFTP sync)
- frankensearch-rerank -> fastembed (default features) -> hf-hub-native-tls

Adding openssl with vendored feature compiles OpenSSL from source and
links it statically, so release binaries no longer require system
libssl.so.3/libcrypto.so.3 at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,6 +94,8 @@ dialoguer = "*"
 
 # SFTP fallback for sync when rsync is unavailable
 ssh2 = "*"
+# Statically link OpenSSL so release binaries don't require system libssl.so.3
+openssl = { version = "*", features = ["vendored"] }
 argon2 = "*"
 hkdf = "*"
 zeroize = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
